en.ActorDefinitionDesc: The following artifacts define the types of individuals and/or systems that will interact as part of the use cases covered by this implementation guide.
en.RequirementsDesc: The following artifacts describe the specific requirements to be met by systems compliant with the implementation guide.
en.CapabilityStatementDesc: The following artifacts define the specific capabilities that different types of systems are expected to have in order to comply with this implementation guide.  Systems conforming to this implementation guide are expected to declare conformance to one or more of the following capability statements.
en.OperationDefinitionDesc: These are custom operations that can be supported by and/or invoked by systems conforming to this implementation guide.
en.EventDefinitionDesc: Defines system and business occurrences that drive a need for data to flow from systems in this implementation guide.
en.MessageDefinitionDesc: These define the types of messages that can be sent and/or received by systems conforming to this implementation guide.
en.SearchParameterDesc: These define the properties by which a RESTful server can be searched.  They can also be used for sorting and including related resources.
en.SubscriptionTopicDesc: These define the types of information that can be subscribed to on systems conforming to this this implementation guide.
en.ActivityDefinitionDesc: These define activities that can be performed as part of content in this implementation guide.
en.PlanDefinitionDesc: These define workflows, rules, strategies, or protocols as part of content in this implementation guide.
en.MeasureDesc: These define measures as part of content in this implementation guide.
en.LibraryDesc: These define logic, asset collections and other libraries as part of content in this implementation guide.
en.EvidenceDesc: Indicates research or other information that justifies or support the information exchange defined in this implemetnation guide
en.EvidenceVariableDesc: Components of the research that justify or support the information exchange defined in this implementation guide
en.CitationDesc: Supports referencing artifacts defined in this implementation guide.
en.ResourceDesc: 'Additional' resources that are not yet published in the FHIR core specification.
en.GraphDefinitionDesc: These define collections of interrelated resources that are useful to pass around as a group.
en.LogicalModelDesc: These define data models that represent the domain covered by this implementation guide in more business-friendly terms than the underlying FHIR resources.
en.QuestionnaireDesc: These define forms used by systems conforming to this implementation guide to capture or expose data to end users.
en.AbstractProfileDesc: These are profiles on resources or data types that describe patterns used by other profiles but cannot be instantiated directly.  I.e. instances can conform to profiles *based* on these abstract profiles, but do not declare conformance to the abstract profiles themselves.
en.ResourceProfileDesc: These define constraints on FHIR resources for systems conforming to this implementation guide.
en.DataTypeDesc: These define constraints on FHIR data types for systems conforming to this implementation guide.
en.ExtensionDesc: These define constraints on FHIR data types for systems conforming to this implementation guide.
en.ValueSetDesc: These define sets of codes used by systems conforming to this implementation guide.
en.CodeSystemDesc: These define new code systems used by systems conforming to this implementation guide.
en.NamingSystemDesc: These define identifier and/or code system identities used by systems conforming to this implementation guide.
en.TerminologyCapDesc: Parameters that define the expansion of value sets used within the implementation guide.
en.StructureMapDesc: These define transformations to convert between data structures used by systems conforming to this implementation guide.
en.ConceptMapDesc: These define transformations to convert between codes by systems conforming with this implementation guide.
en.TestPlanDesc: These test plans are available to verify test coverage for this implementation guide.
en.TestScriptDesc: These test definitions are available to FHIR test engines to verify systems are conforming to this implementation guide.
en.ConditionDefinitionDesc: Formal descriptions of conditions and symptoms relevant to the use of this implementation guide.
en.ObservationDefinitionDesc: Formal descriptions of types of observations relevant to the use of this implementation guide.
en.SpecimenDefinitionDesc: Formal descriptions of the types of specimens relevant to the use of this implementation guide.
en.ChargeItemDefinitionDesc: Definitions of chargeable costs relevant to the use of this implementation guide.
en.ExampleScenarioDesc: These define groups of interrelated examples that demonstrate one or more of the workflows supported by this implementation guide.
en.ExampleDesc: These are example instances that show what data produced and consumed by systems conforming with this implementation guide might look like.
en.ExampleSupportingDesc: These are example instances that are not governed by this implementation guide, but which are necessary to support other examples defined in the IG.
en.OtherDesc: These are resources that are used within this implementation guide that do not fit into one of the other categories.

vi.ActorDefinitionName: Yêu cầu: Định nghĩa tác nhân
vi.ActorDefinitionDesc: Các artifact sau định nghĩa các loại cá nhân và/hoặc hệ thống sẽ tương tác trong các ca sử dụng của bộ hướng dẫn triển khai này.
vi.RequirementsName: Yêu cầu: Yêu cầu hình thức
vi.RequirementsDesc: Các artifact sau mô tả những yêu cầu cụ thể mà hệ thống tuân thủ bộ hướng dẫn triển khai này phải đáp ứng.
vi.CapabilityStatementDesc: Các artifact sau xác định những năng lực cụ thể mà các loại hệ thống khác nhau cần có để tuân thủ bộ hướng dẫn triển khai này.
vi.OperationDefinitionDesc: Đây là các operation tùy biến có thể được hỗ trợ và/hoặc gọi bởi các hệ thống tuân thủ bộ hướng dẫn triển khai này.
vi.EventDefinitionDesc: Defines system and business occurrences that drive a need for data to flow from systems in this implementation guide.
vi.MessageDefinitionDesc: These define the types of messages that can be sent and/or received by systems conforming to this implementation guide.
vi.SearchParameterDesc: Các artifact sau định nghĩa các thuộc tính mà một máy chủ RESTful có thể dùng để tìm kiếm, sắp xếp và include tài nguyên liên quan.
vi.SubscriptionTopicDesc: These define the types of information that can be subscribed to on systems conforming to this this implementation guide.
vi.ActivityDefinitionDesc: These define activities that can be performed as part of content in this implementation guide.
vi.PlanDefinitionDesc: These define workflows, rules, strategies, or protocols as part of content in this implementation guide.
vi.MeasureDesc: These define measures as part of content in this implementation guide.
vi.LibraryDesc: These define logic, asset collections and other libraries as part of content in this implementation guide.
vi.EvidenceDesc: Indicates research or other information that justifies or support the information exchange defined in this implemetnation guide
vi.EvidenceVariableDesc: Components of the research that justify or support the information exchange defined in this implementation guide
vi.CitationDesc: Supports referencing artifacts defined in this implementation guide.
vi.ResourceDesc: 'Additional' resources that are not yet published in the FHIR core specification.
vi.GraphDefinitionDesc: These define collections of interrelated resources that are useful to pass around as a group.
vi.LogicalModelDesc: Các artifact sau định nghĩa mô hình dữ liệu biểu diễn miền nghiệp vụ của bộ hướng dẫn triển khai này bằng thuật ngữ gần với người dùng nghiệp vụ hơn tài nguyên FHIR nền.
vi.QuestionnaireDesc: These define forms used by systems conforming to this implementation guide to capture or expose data to end users.
vi.AbstractProfileDesc: These are profiles on resources or data types that describe patterns used by other profiles but cannot be instantiated directly.  I.e. instances can conform to profiles *based* on these abstract profiles, but do not declare conformance to the abstract profiles themselves.
vi.ResourceProfileName: Cấu trúc: Hồ sơ tài nguyên
vi.ResourceProfileDesc: Các artifact sau định nghĩa các ràng buộc trên tài nguyên FHIR cho các hệ thống tuân thủ bộ hướng dẫn triển khai này.
vi.DataTypeDesc: These define constraints on FHIR data types for systems conforming to this implementation guide.
vi.ExtensionDesc: Các artifact sau định nghĩa các ràng buộc trên kiểu dữ liệu FHIR cho các hệ thống tuân thủ bộ hướng dẫn triển khai này.
vi.ValueSetDesc: Các artifact sau định nghĩa các tập mã được sử dụng bởi các hệ thống tuân thủ bộ hướng dẫn triển khai này.
vi.CodeSystemDesc: Các artifact sau định nghĩa các bộ mã mới được sử dụng bởi các hệ thống tuân thủ bộ hướng dẫn triển khai này.
vi.NamingSystemDesc: Các artifact sau định nghĩa danh tính của hệ thống định danh và/hoặc hệ thống mã dùng trong bộ hướng dẫn triển khai này.
vi.TerminologyCapDesc: Parameters that define the expansion of value sets used within the implementation guide.
vi.StructureMapDesc: These define transformations to convert between data structures used by systems conforming to this implementation guide.
vi.ConceptMapDesc: Các artifact sau định nghĩa ánh xạ chuyển đổi giữa các mã cho các hệ thống tuân thủ bộ hướng dẫn triển khai này.
vi.TestPlanDesc: These test plans are available to verify test coverage for this implementation guide.
vi.TestScriptDesc: These test definitions are available to FHIR test engines to verify systems are conforming to this implementation guide.
vi.ConditionDefinitionDesc: Formal descriptions of conditions and symptoms relevant to the use of this implementation guide.
vi.ObservationDefinitionDesc: Formal descriptions of types of observations relevant to the use of this implementation guide.
vi.SpecimenDefinitionDesc: Formal descriptions of the types of specimens relevant to the use of this implementation guide.
vi.ChargeItemDefinitionDesc: Definitions of chargeable costs relevant to the use of this implementation guide.
vi.ExampleScenarioDesc: Các artifact sau định nghĩa các nhóm ví dụ liên kết với nhau để minh họa một hoặc nhiều workflow được hỗ trợ.
vi.ExampleDesc: Các artifact sau là ví dụ minh họa dữ liệu mà các hệ thống tuân thủ bộ hướng dẫn triển khai này có thể tạo ra hoặc tiêu thụ.
vi.ExampleSupportingDesc: These are example instances that are not governed by this implementation guide, but which are necessary to support other examples defined in the IG.
vi.OtherDesc: These are resources that are used within this implementation guide that do not fit into one of the other categories.
